Why Choose EV Exec?

Airport transfer specialists you can rely on.

Fixed & Transparent Prices

No hidden costs. What we quote is what you pay.

Flight Monitoring Included

We track your flight in real-time for perfect timing.

Luxury Tesla Model Y

Travel in comfort in our premium electric vehicle.

Local & Professional Driver

Polite, experienced and dedicated to your journey.

5 Star Rated Service

Hundreds of happy customers across Blackpool & Fylde.

Eco-Friendly Travel

Zero emissions. Better for you, better for the planet.

EV Exec Experience

The Journey Begins the Moment We Arrive.

From the second your driver pulls up, everything is taken care of. Your luggage, your comfort, your time.

We Arrive Early

Your driver is always there before you are. Smartly dressed, vehicle immaculate, ready to go. No waiting. No stress.

Your Comfort, First

Settle into premium heated leather seating. WiFi connected. Refreshments waiting. Climate set to your preference.

We Track Your Flight

Every booking includes live flight monitoring. Delays, early arrivals — we adapt so you never wait at the airport.

A Quiet, Smooth Journey

The Tesla cabin is whisper-quiet. No engine noise. No stress. Just a smooth, effortless ride to your destination.

Door to Departure

We drop you at the terminal entrance. Luggage handled. Departure stress-free.

Onboard Comfort

Premium Comfort, Every Mile

Your Tesla Model Y, appointed for first-class travel.

In-Vehicle Entertainment

Stream your favourite content on the Tesla’s rear entertainment screen. Netflix, YouTube, Spotify and more — available on longer journeys for a truly first-class experience.

Luxury Individual Seating

Sink into premium heated leather seats with generous legroom.

Refreshments Included

Chilled water and refreshments on every transfer. Complimentary, always.

Device Charging

USB-A, USB-C and wireless charging. Arrive with a full battery.

Climate Comfort

Whisper-quiet Tesla cabin. Your perfect temperature, every journey.

Eco-Conscious Travel

Premium electric travel with zero tailpipe emissions across the Fylde Coast.

Book Now

Book in 3 Simple Steps

Reserving your premium transfer takes under 2 minutes.

01

Request

Complete our simple booking form with your journey details — pickup address, airport, date, time and passenger count.

02

Confirm

Receive your SMS confirmation with a fixed, all-inclusive price. No surprises. No hidden charges. Your booking is secured.

03

Travel

Your driver arrives early, every time. Sit back, relax and enjoy the EV Exec experience from door to departure.

Built on Trust. Driven by Excellence.

An independent, owner-operated service — where every journey matters.

Professional

Impeccably presented drivers. Smart dress, polished vehicles, a warm welcome — every single time. No call centres. No compromises.

Eco-Conscious

100% electric Tesla fleet. Zero emissions. The greenest premium transfer on the Fylde Coast — luxury travel with a conscience.

Reliable

Real-time flight tracking on every booking. Early or delayed — your driver is always there, waiting for you.

  • Fully Licensed & Insured
  • Enhanced DBS Checked
  • 12+ Years Experience
  • Polite, Punctual & Professional
  • 100% Electric Fleet
